title: Vežba 84

questions.text:
Ovo je blog post Lindine, prema razgovoru sa Jake-om.

Lessons Learned from a Security Challenge By Linda October 26, 2024

Last week, our team had to work overtime. We found a serious security problem in our design project. Jake, who handles security, worked late to fix it while the rest of the team waited to continue. It wasn't easy, but we learned a lot.

We now know that we need to check for security issues while working on design updates, not after. This experience taught us how important it is to stay on top of things and not fall behind.

Ko je bio odgovoran za bezbednost?

answers.feedback: Linda je pomenuta u diskusiji, ali nema sigurnosnu odgovornost.
Tekst jasno pominje osobu koja je uključena u sigurnost.
Nije spomenut konsultant za bezbednost u dokumentima.

instructions: Pročitajte tekst i odgovorite na pitanje koje se nalazi ispod.
explanation: Obrati pažnju na prethodnu rečenicu Jake, who handles.... Ovo ga identifikuje kao osobu sa sigurnosnom odgovornošću.
